name: Huevos Habaneros (Eggs Havana Style)
recipeIngredient: 1 small green bell pepper, finely chopped
1 cup canned tomatoes, drained and chopped
fresh ground black pepper to taste
fresh ground black pepper to taste
1 tablespoon chopped parsley, finely chopped (for garnish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a medium skillet over low heat, warm the olive oil until fragrant.
3. Cook the onion, bell pepper, and garlic for 8-10 minutes, stirring occasionally until tender.
4. Add the canned tomatoes (or tomato sauce), pimiento, and dry sherry. Simmer until thickened, about 15 minutes, seasoning with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Lightly oil four ramekins or au gratin dishes. Divide the sauce among them.
6. For each dish, gently pour two eggs into a saucer and slide them onto the tomato mixture.
7. Drizzle with 1 tablespoon melted butter.
8. Bake until the egg whites are set and yolks remain soft, approximately 10-12 minutes.
9. Sprinkle with salt, pepper, and chopped parsley before serving directly from the baking dishes (place each on a serving plate to protect the table).
